creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is simple. It's not a tunable - port maintainers are not supposed
to set it.

It defines, if the libdata/ldconfig directory is part of the mtree on a
given OSVERSION system or not. If it's part of the mtree, it's not
created. If it's old system, it's created, ldconfig_compat port is
pulled in, and it's cleaned up on deinstall.

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

No one expects the spanish inquisition.
